name: TOUGHBUILT INDUSTRIES INC
summary: TOUGHBUILT INDUSTRIES INC designs, manufactures and distributes home improvement and construction products for both the professional and do-it-yourself markets. The company's products include tool bags, tool pouches, sawhorses, and other accessories, with headquarters in Foothill Ranch, California. ToughBuilt Industries aims to provide innovative and durable products for tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts.
